case_title: HCG ASSOCIATES, INC. VS. AHMET "GUS" HARPUTS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,400.00 FILED BY HCG ASSOCIATES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HARPUTS, AHMET "GUS" ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-14-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HCG ASSOCIATES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARPUTS, AHMET "GUS" $4,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,510.50, THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED DID NOT ESTABLISH THAT THIS WAS A CORPORATE OBLIGATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HCG ASSOCIATES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HARPUTS, AHMET "GUS"
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (SERVICE FEE $59.50) SERVED MAR-02-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT HARPUTS, AHMET "GUS"
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-14-2010 - JUDGMENT.
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF HCG ASSOCIATES, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HCG ASSOCIATES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-14-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-14-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
